title: Dưa Cải Cay

sections.heading: Nguyên liệu · Ingredients
items: 1 large bunch mustard greens (cải cay), about 1.5 lbs
2 stalks green onion (hành lá), cut into sections
2–3 red horn chilies (ớt sừng đỏ), sliced

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Pick off any damaged leaves from the mustard greens. Wash thoroughly. Cut into pieces about 5cm long.
Cut the green onion into sections. Slice the shallots. Cut the red chilies into rounds (khoanh).
Place all ingredients -- mustard greens, green onion, shallots, and chili -- into a clean jar.
Pour salted water (nước muối dưa) into the jar until it covers the surface of the vegetables.
Cover and leave at room temperature for 2–3 days until sour. Transfer to the refrigerator.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
